message: Hello B1. To maximize our payoffs over 20 rounds, let's agree on a fair price around 50-60. What's your valuation range? My cost is mid-20s.
Fair for whom? Your mid-20s cost vs. what buyer valuation? Let's see real offers.
Last round no trade hurt us both. I'll lower to ask 42 this round to ensure trade. What's your planned bid? Let's split surplus fairly over 20 rounds.
My valuation is 35. I'll bid 30 every round. Ask 30 and we trade.
Traded at 30 last round, good start. With cost 26 and your val 35, surplus 9—fair split at 30.5. Propose bid/ask 31 ongoing for steady profits over remaining rounds.
I bid 30 every round. Ask 30 and we trade every time. Otherwise no trade. Let's both profit.
Last trade at 30 with your bid 31—progress! Let's both submit 31 this round for trade at 31, fairer split of surplus 9. Ensures profits over 17 rounds.
Agreed. We'll both set 31. This ensures trade and fair split given my val 35 and your cost 26.
I'll bid 31. Please ask 31.
Agreed, I'll ask 31. Let's keep trading at 31 for max profits over remaining rounds.
S1, let's set 30 for a balanced split: you get 4 (30-26) and I get 5 (35-30). Better than 31 where you get 5 and I get 4.
Let's stick to 31 for steady profits over 15 rounds. Fair split of surplus 9—you get 4, I get 5. I'll ask 31, please bid 31 to ensure trade.
Let's continue at 31 for fair split (you 4, me 5) and max profits over 14 rounds. I'll ask 31—please bid 31 to ensure trade.

S1, let's set 30 for remaining rounds. You get 4 (30-26), I get 5 (35-30). Fair trade every time.
